description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive alternating striped pattern on its top surface, featuring parallel bands of light gray, speckled stone and deep black material. The sides of the block are solid black, providing a stark contrast to the patterned top. The stripes are evenly spaced and run the full length of the block, creating a visually striking effect reminiscent of modern urban design elements. The block appears dense and heavy, likely constructed from granite or a similar durable stone, with the black stripes possibly being a different stone or a treated surface. The edges are sharp and well-defined, suggesting recent fabrication or minimal weathering. Its flat, broad surface makes it suitable for use as a barrier, platform, or decorative urban feature.
description: A rectangular stone block with alternating light gray and black stripes on top and solid black sides, featuring sharp edges and a modern, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface with horizontal bands and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of the stripes and the solid black side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical stripes and a solid black side, similar to view 1.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and edges are sharp, indicating recent installation or minimal exposure.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: aligned in a row or series with similar blocks to form a continuous barrier or edge
